subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, free from the taint of description and exposition, befitteth the Beloved of all contingent beings, Who through His all-encompassing mercy and grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از شائبه بیان و تبیان محبوب امکانرا سزا است که از رحمت بسیطه و عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
